source_handoff: .workflow/.brainstorm/BS-2026-04-29-盲盒条件风险池物品化修正/handoff-spec.json

relevant_files.rationale: Contains current pilot bundles for boxes 15/16/17 and the problematic conditional_items / blocked_or_risky entries.
Existing tests verify schema and blocked leakage; must be extended to reject non-object patterns in all pools.
Repository-level content rules must reflect that all five pool layers contain concrete objects only.
User-facing project summary must reflect the corrected pool semantics.
Tool-specific maintainer instructions must prevent recurrence.
Desktop-tool docs must describe corrected pilot behavior.

existing_patterns: BLIND_BOX_COMPATIBILITY_MAPPING excludes blocked_or_risky from default runtime buckets.
test_blind_box_content_model.py already imports data modules and validates pilot schema.
Runtime still consumes BLIND_BOXES with name/large/medium/small/hanging keys.
current_failures: conditional_items include low-value small attachments such as labels, cards, tags, clips, and edge-mounted details.
blocked_or_risky includes non-object visual phenomena such as paper edge folds, tiny scratches, bubble strings, underwater shadow patches, grass specks, edge lines, and tiny stains.
Tests block leakage from blocked_or_risky to default buckets, but do not require blocked_or_risky itself to contain only concrete objects.
architecture_constraints: This is a static-data correction; no runtime UI redesign is needed.
Pilot boxes 15/16/17 must remain available through existing four runtime buckets.
The correction should not rename fields in MVP, to avoid unnecessary churn.
